location: A guaranteed drop from the Godskin Apostle field boss at the top of Dominula, Windmill Village, in northern Altus Plateau.
tactics: From Road of Iniquity Side Path grace, head toward the elevated windmill settlement in the north of the region
Fight through groups of Celebrant dancer-type enemies climbing up through the village before reaching the boss arena
The Godskin Apostle is weak to Hemorrhage and Frost and takes extra Slash damage — infusing accordingly helps a lot
Past ~50% HP his body stretches, massively extending his attack range — keep distance during this phase and punish slow recovery windows
lore: The Godskin sect are fanatical, near-immortal warrior-priests who worship the burning of flesh and the erasure of the self; the Peeler is one of their signature twin-bladed weapons, built for flaying and boring into an opponent's body rather than clean cutting.

builds.name: Dexterity twinblade
builds.why: E Strength / C Dexterity scaling — a fast, aggressive dual-slash build dumping most points into Dex with just enough Str to meet the requirement

builds.name: Bleed/Frost infusion
builds.why: Carries no innate status of its own, so a Blood or Frost infusion turns it into a proc weapon that also exploits the very boss it drops from
